memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzRoger於1167年出生在英國達勒姆拉比時，他的父親Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth38歲，母親Adeliza de Vere42歲。他於1189年9月29日之後與Margaret de Chesney在英國諾福爾可霍斯福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1197年被列為sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp)。他去世於1214年11月22日之前在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert FitzRoger于1167年出生在英国達勒姆拉比时，他的父亲Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth38岁，母亲Adeliza de Vere42岁。他于1189年9月29日之后与Margaret de Chesney在英国諾福爾可霍斯福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1197年被列为sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp)。他去世于1214年11月22日之前在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzRoger was born in 1167, in Raby, Durham, England, his father, Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth, was 38 and his mother, Adeliza de Vere, was 42. He married Margaret de Chesney after 29 September 1189, in Horsford, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1197, his occupation is listed as sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp). He died before 22 November 1214, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzRoger est né en 1167, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adeliza de Vere, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Chesney après 29 septembre 1189, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1197, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp). Il est décédé avant 22 novembre 1214, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert FitzRoger 1167 in Raby, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth 38 und seine Mutter Adeliza de Vere 42. Er hat nach 29. September 1189 in Horsford, Norfolk, England Margaret de Chesney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1197 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp) aufgeführt. Er starb vor 22. November 1214 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRoger è nato il nel 1167 nel Raby, Durham, England, il suo padre, Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza de Vere, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Chesney dopo il 29 settembre 1189, nel Horsford, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1197, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp). Morì prima del 22 novembre 1214, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRogerが1167年にイギリスダルハムラビーで生まれた時，父Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworthは38歳，母Adeliza de Vereは42歳であった。1189年9月29日以後にイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードでMargaret de Chesneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1197年，職業はsheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp)と記録されている。彼は1214年11月22日以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRoger(이)가 1167년 영국 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza de Vere(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1189년 9월 29일 이후 영국 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 Margaret de Chesney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1197년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp)이었다. 그는 1214년 11월 22일 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRoger nasceu em 1167, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza de Vere, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Chesney após 29 de setembro de 1189, em Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1197, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp). Ele faleceu antes 22 de novembro de 1214, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzRoger родился в 1167 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza de Vere, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Chesney после 29 сентябрь 1189 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1197 году он работал по профессии sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp). Он умер перед 22 ноябрь 1214 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert FitzRoger nació en 1167, en Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adeliza de Vere, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margaret de Chesney después de 29 de septiembre de 1189, en Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1197, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of norfolk (appointed due to the influence of william de longchamp). Murió antes de 22 de noviembre de 1214, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
